title: Tighten SwipeCarouselSection spacing and add subtle animated right-arrow indicator

requirements.summary: Reduce vertical gap between carousel image block and text block while preserving mobile-first vertical flow and existing copy.
acceptanceCriteria: On mobile and desktop, the gap between the slide image and the start of the text block is visibly smaller than before, without causing overlap/clipping.
The slide image remains fully visible (non-cropped) and keeps `object-fit: contain` behavior.
No carousel text in `frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts` is modified (wording, emojis, line breaks, and which slides have bullets remain exactly the same).

file_operations.description: Tighten the vertical spacing between the image container and the text container by reducing the wrapping stack gap classes (e.g., adjust the `flex flex-col gap-*` values) while keeping the image-above-text layout and keeping MediaFrame `objectFit="contain"` unchanged.

requirements.summary: Reduce line spacing (leading) within carousel text elements (title/description/bullets/tagline) for a tighter but readable layout without changing copy.
acceptanceCriteria: Line spacing within the description and bullet lines is slightly tighter than before (reduced leading), but remains readable on mobile and desktop.
Spacing reduction does not cause text to collide with bullets, markers, or other UI elements.
No changes are made to the actual carousel copy content in `frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts`.

file_operations.description: Adjust Tailwind leading classes within the carousel text block (e.g., replace `leading-relaxed` / `leading-tight` as needed with slightly tighter leading) for description, bullet text, and tagline while preserving readability and not modifying any copy coming from `tbnCopy`.

requirements.summary: Add a subtle, continuously animated, non-interactive right-side arrow indicator within the carousel section that doesn’t overlap content or existing controls and doesn’t introduce horizontal overflow.
acceptanceCriteria: A right-side arrow indicator is visible within the carousel section and has a continuous subtle animation (e.g., gentle nudge/pulse) to suggest horizontal movement.
The arrow does not block/cover the slide image, slide text, pagination dots, or prev/next buttons on common mobile and desktop breakpoints.
The arrow is non-interactive (does not capture clicks/drags intended for the carousel) and does not introduce horizontal page overflow/scrolling.
The arrow indicator uses accessible markup (decorative arrow is `aria-hidden` or otherwise does not create confusing screen reader output).

file_operations.description: Add a dedicated subtle horizontal nudge/pulse keyframes + animation utility (e.g., a gentle right-arrow hint animation) to support the carousel indicator motion without relying on inline styles.

Render a decorative right-arrow indicator (reuse existing ChevronRight icon) positioned absolutely within the carousel area (inside a `relative` container) using `pointer-events-none`, subtle black+gold styling, and the new animation utility; add layout padding/gutter as needed to ensure it never overlaps slide image/text or navigation controls and does not create horizontal page overflow; mark the indicator `aria-hidden`.

Add a minimal render test ensuring the arrow indicator is present with decorative accessibility treatment (e.g., `aria-hidden`) and does not interfere with the existing navigation controls (sanity check selectors/testids).
